The '''Beast Wars''' (also called the '''Beast Wars of Onderon''') was a localized conflict lasting approximately 400 years following the arrival of [[Freedon Nadd]] on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]]. The conflict ultimately helped to touch off the [[Krath Holy Crusade]], part of the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].

==History==
===Origins===
The Beast Wars were the product of the unusual relationship between [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] and its moon [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]]: the moon orbited in such a way that once a year the atmospheres of both bodies would connect. Over the centuries, the [[Drexl]]s, flying predators native to Dxun, learned that they could use this "[[Oxygen/Legends|oxygen]] bridge" to migrate to Onderon and settle there.<ref name="totj1" />

In response to the vicious nature of the Drexls, the [[Human/Legends|Humans]] of Onderon built a large, walled city that would come to be known as [[Iziz/Legends|Iziz]] to protect themselves.<ref name="totj1" /> Around this time, a [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] by the name of [[Freedon Nadd]] arrived on Onderon, becoming [[King/Legends|king]] and creating a long line of darkness within the Onderonian royalty.<ref name="totj2" /> It was soon decreed that all criminals in Iziz would be sent out into the wildlands of Onderon, to be killed by the Dxun beasts—<ref name="totj1" />though, due to the strong dark-side nature of the royal house at the time, half of these "criminals" were simply those who disagreed with the monarchy.<ref name="totj2" /> However, in time, many of these exiles learned to tame the beasts and became the [[Beast Riders]]. They used them to attack Iziz, thus beginning the Beast Wars of Onderon.<ref name="totj1" />

===The End of the Beast Wars===
{{Main|Battle of Iziz}}
In [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]], the conflict reached new heights. The [[Force ghost/Legends|Force ghost]] of Freedon Nadd warned the ruler of Onderon, Queen [[Amanoa]], that a war with the Beast Riders would lead to her destruction, so she appealed for [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] aid to end the Beast Wars.<ref name="TOTJC">''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]''</ref> [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Arca Jeth]] was assigned to the [[Japrael system/Legends|Onderon system]] as its [[Jedi Watchman/Legends|watchman]]. He sent his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]], [[Tott Doneeta]] and [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic]] and [[Cay Qel-Droma|Cay]] Qel-Droma, to settle the problem on Onderon. As they arrived in Queen [[Amanoa]]'s throne room, a group of [[Beast Riders]] staged a daring raid on the city and kidnapped Amanoa's daughter, the [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Galia]].<ref name="totj1" /> The Jedi ventured into the wildlands to save the Princess, and Tott was able to tame a [[boma]], which led them to the fortress of [[Beast-Lord]] [[Modon Kira]]. The Jedi entered the building, only to discover an ongoing wedding-feast between Galia and Modon's son, [[Oron Kira]].<ref name="totj2" />

[[File:Arca_Jeth_in_the_Beast_Wars.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Arca Jeth upon arriving on Onderon to mediate the Beast Wars]]
Ulic attempted to rescue the Princess, but she claimed that she, in fact, ''wanted'' to be married. Modon set up a peaceful banquet to discuss things, where the Kiras revealed to the Jedi that the Onderonian royal family was influenced by the dark side of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and the spirit of Freedon Nadd. Galia, Oron, and the Jedi headed back to Iziz to speak with Queen Amanoa, having agreed with Modon that he would launch an attack should they fail.<ref name="totj2" />

When they arrived, Amanoa unleashed her dark side powers upon them, forcing them to retreat into a secret passageway. Oron informed his father on the comm that they had failed. And so, Modon's massive gathering of Beast Lords from all over Onderon marched towards Iziz, with the Jedi battling Amanoa's royal guard in the throne room—one of whom used a [[Halberd/Legends|halberd]] to cut off Cay's arm, which was later replaced by an arm from an [[XT-6 droid]].<ref name="totj2" />

Amanoa attempted to turn the tide of the battle using the dark side, but was thwarted by the newly-arrived Arca Jeth's Jedi [[Battle meditation/Legends|battle meditation]], allowing the beast-riders to take advantage, and soon Iziz had fallen. The Jedi, Oron, and Galia descended into the deepest levels of Amanoa's palace, to the tomb of Freedon Nadd. Amanoa was killed instantly by the sheer light side of the Force emanating from Jeth's body, ending the dark side's half-millennium hold of Iziz. Galia and Oron Kira were married, uniting the beast riders and Iziz.<ref name="totj2" />

The conflict ended late in the year [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]].<ref name="NEC" />

==Aftermath==
In the hopes of ending the dark side influence over Onderon, Arca Jeth had the coffins of Freedon Nadd and Amanoa removed from Iziz and re-interred on Dxun. However, though his body had been ravaged by his use of the dark side of the Force, King [[Ommin/Legends|Ommin]] was still strong in The Force, and fomented an [[Freedon Nadd Uprising|uprising]] among the [[Naddist]]s, those Onderonians who still followed Nadd's teachings.<ref name="uprising1" /> Though the revolt was eventually defeated, Ommin was able to pass on much of his dark side knowledge to two [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Tetan]] nobles, [[Satal Keto/Legends|Satal]] and [[Aleema Keto]], who had traveled to Onderon in search of Sith artifacts.<ref name="uprising2">[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 2]]</ref>

Following Ommin's defeat, the spirit of Freedon Nadd appeared to the Ketos and introduced them to the dark side of the Force.<ref name="uprising2" /> The two would subsequently lead the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] secret society in launching a coup in the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]], leading to the [[Krath Holy Crusade]].<ref name="DLotS1">[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 1|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 1]]</ref>
